keys.description: Compiled expression AST from symfony/expression-language. Keyed on SHA-256 of the raw expression source so identical expressions across templates share a cache entry. Read on every template.when_expression evaluation + selector_expression resolution. Bypasses per approvals.expression_cache_enabled feature flag.

The active approval_templates row for (tenant, application, action_key) — priority-ordered array of template ids ready for the ApprovalTemplateResolver to walk. Read on every approve middleware invocation. TTL short to catch template edits quickly.

Approver groups + resolved selector expressions per template version. Immutable (frozen by version pin), so aggressive TTL. Used by ApprovalInstanceProvisioner to materialise approval_requirements + resolved_approvers on instance-create.
invalidatedBy: ApprovalTemplateObserver — but only for the specific version key

keys.description: Delegation-substitution index — map of `{ delegator_id: delegate_id }` for every ACTIVE RoleDelegation in the tenant. Consulted by ApproverSelectorEngine::resolve() at instance-create time to substitute delegators. Warmed on tenant.activated hook.

ApprovalPresenter's per-instance projection. Keyed on (instance_id, caller's classifications-visible list hash) so different tenants of the same admin dashboard get correctly-redacted views without recomputing. TTL short — instance state changes need to be visible quickly.
Per-user pending-approvals count. Powers the 'inbox' badge in the SPA navbar without a JSONB containment query per navbar-render. TTL short — new approvals need to surface quickly.
Full approvable_actions catalogue (is_active=true) for the tenant-plane action picker. Warmed at boot; invalidated on registry updates.
Reminder-throttle counter for approvals.throttle_reminders middleware. Prevents manual dispatch storm. Auto-expires each hour.

commands.purpose: Support-tooling. --all flushes every apv:* key; --tag flushes tag(s); --pattern flushes matching keys. Used during template-import + delegation-corruption remediation.
